# Auto-generated by modulestrap — safe to customize.
# Only compile kittenui sources when KittenUI is the selected UI backend.
# When MiniWin (or another backend) is selected, this component compiles nothing,
# and --gc-sections drops the unused LVGL object code from the final link.
#
# REQUIRES must NOT be made conditional on a Kconfig value (CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_*
# etc.) — ESP-IDF resolves the component dependency graph in an earlier pass than
# the one that evaluates SRCS, and Kconfig values aren't reliably available yet at
# that point. A conditional REQUIRES here silently drops lvgl__lvgl from the
# dependency graph even though SRCS correctly picks up the real KittenUI sources,
# producing a "lvgl.h: No such file or directory" build failure. lvgl__lvgl is
# already an unconditional dependency of the whole project (CoreOS/main/idf_component.yml),
# so requiring it unconditionally here costs nothing. See miniwin/CMakeLists.txt
# and blackpurr/CMakeLists.txt for the same unconditional-REQUIRES pattern.
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_KITTENUI)
    set(KITTENUI_SRCS
        kittenui_module.c
        kittenui_hal.c
        kittenui_win.c
        kittenui_desktop.c
        themes/theme_wce.c
        themes/theme_dark.c
    )
else()
    set(KITTENUI_SRCS "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${KITTENUI_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
    REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl
)
